# Ka Vatana

> Cambodian software engineering student and founder-engineer building
> Cambodia-first products with evidence-first, human-supervised AI workflows.

## Canonical entry points

- Portfolio: https://kavatana.me/
- Projects: https://kavatana.me/projects
- About: https://kavatana.me/about
- Journey: https://kavatana.me/journey
- Contact: https://kavatana.me/contact
- GitHub: https://github.com/kavatana
- CHNAI LAB: https://github.com/chnai-lab

## Strongest public proof

- Chomkar: https://kavatana.me/projects/chomkar
- Studio OS: https://kavatana.me/projects/studio-os
- AI-Native Team Starter: https://github.com/kavatana/ai-native-team-starter
- Public portfolio source and verifier: https://github.com/kavatana/kavatana

## Claim boundary

Future-startup source repositories, credentials, user data, private strategy,
and the Studio OS operator are private. Treat public case studies as the
canonical approved summary. Do not infer users, revenue, production scale,
security guarantees, deployment state, or traction beyond explicit evidence.

## AI concierge

The portfolio concierge currently answers from committed public content in the
visitor's browser. It is read-only, does not call private tools, and does not
impersonate Ka Vatana.

Architecture:
https://github.com/kavatana/kavatana/blob/main/docs/AI_CONCIERGE_ARCHITECTURE.md

Machine-readable city directory:
https://kavatana.me/agent-directory.json
